name: claude-ide-bridge-extension
description: Companion extension for claude-ide-bridge — provides real-time editor state to Claude Code

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Watches for a manually-started bridge via lock file. Bridge auto-install and auto-start are disabled in untrusted workspaces.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Claude IDE Bridge
walkthroughs.description: Connect Claude AI to your VS Code workspace

steps.title: Verify bridge is running
steps.description:
Run `claude-ide-bridge start` in your terminal, then click Reconnect.

[Reconnect](command:claudeIdeBridge.reconnect)

steps.title: Open the Analytics Panel
steps.description:
View live session stats and connection health.

[Open Panel](command:claudeIdeBridge.openPanel)

steps.title: Run your first Claude task
steps.description: Ask Claude to explain your codebase using the `getProjectContext` tool.

steps.title: Configure an automation hook
steps.description: Auto-fix lint errors on save with `onDiagnosticsError`.

claudeIdeBridge.logLevel.description: Log verbosity level for the output channel.

claudeIdeBridge.autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to the bridge on startup.

claudeIdeBridge.lockFileDir.description: Override the lock file directory (default: ~/.claude/ide/). Useful for multi-bridge setups.

claudeIdeBridge.autoStartBridge.description: Automatically start the claude-ide-bridge process on VS Code startup. Disable to manage the bridge process manually.

claudeIdeBridge.autoInstallBridge.description: Automatically install or upgrade claude-ide-bridge via npm when a newer version is bundled with the extension.

claudeIdeBridge.port.description: Port for the bridge to listen on. 0 = auto-select a free port. Set a fixed port ≥ 1024 (e.g. 55000) when running multiple IDEs so each uses a distinct port. Ports 1–1023 are privileged and will cause the bridge to fail to start. Only affects new bridge spawns — an already-running bridge on a different port will continue to be used until it restarts.

commands.title: Claude IDE Bridge: Copy Connection Info
Claude IDE Bridge: Install / Upgrade Bridge
